name: Shiori MCP Server
description: MCP server for Shiori — open-source AI study companion. Access assignments, grades, notes, and flashcards from Claude Code or Claude Desktop. Ask Claude what's due, calculate the grade you need, or summarize your notes.

tools.name: get_study_summary
tools.description: Full academic snapshot — overdue work, current GPA, upcoming deadlines, and active flashcard decks

tools.name: get_assignments
tools.description: List and filter assignments by course, status (pending/overdue/completed), and days until due

tools.name: get_grades
tools.description: Per-course grade breakdown with letter grades, percentages, and cumulative GPA

tools.name: get_notes
tools.description: List and read markdown notes organized by course

tools.name: add_assignment
tools.description: Create a new assignment with title, course, due date, and priority from Claude

tools.name: get_flashcard_decks
tools.description: Spaced repetition review status per deck — cards due, total cards, last reviewed
